name: ai-quickstart-guide
description: AI Quickstart Strategy Guide — a 12-month playbook for government agencies adopting AI

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --jsxImportSource preact --moduleResolution bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --allowImportingTsExtensions src/components/*.tsx src/lib/*.ts
